practices.name: Mailbox
practices.description: Default inbound message endpoint for generic agent delivery.

practices.name: Pool Connect
practices.description: Connect the SQLite pool to its database file.

practices.name: Pool Disconnect
practices.description: Close the SQLite pool database connection.

practices.name: Pool Create Table
practices.description: Create a table in the SQLite pool.

practices.name: Pool Table Exists
practices.description: Check whether a SQLite table exists.

practices.name: Pool Insert
practices.description: Insert or replace one row in the SQLite pool.

practices.name: Pool Query
practices.description: Execute a SQL query against the SQLite pool.

practices.name: Pool Get Table Data
practices.description: Read rows from a SQLite table.

practices.name: Pool Store Memory
practices.description: Store one memory record in the SQLite pool.

practices.name: Pool Search Memory
practices.description: Search stored memory records in the SQLite pool.

practices.name: Get Pulse Data
practices.description: Fetch or transform pulse payloads for the agent's supported pulses.

pulse_name.description: Optional pulse identifier. Defaults to the pulser's primary pulse.
